CREATE TABLE test_data (population UInt8) ENGINE = Log;
CREATE TABLE sample_data (value Float64) ENGINE = Log;
CREATE TABLE mixed_data (id UInt32, score Float64) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT stddevSamp(score) FROM mixed_data WHERE id > 1;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (group_id UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT group_id, stddevSamp(value) FROM complex_data GROUP BY group_id;
CREATE TABLE join_data1 (key UInt32, value Float64) ENGINE = Log;
CREATE TABLE join_data2 (key UInt32, multiplier Float64) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT j.key, stddevSamp(j.value * m.multiplier) FROM join_data1 AS j JOIN join_data2 AS m ON j.key = m.key GROUP BY j.key;
CREATE TABLE nested_data (val Float64) ENGINE = Log;
SELECT stddevSamp(subquery.val) FROM (SELECT val FROM nested_data WHERE val < 10) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE decimal_data (amount Decimal(10, 3)) ENGINE = Log;
